about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm Antonio Fortunato, an Analyst with a strong academic background in Economics and Business (110/110 with honors). I combine business expertise with a technology-driven, analytical mindset.
about.p2: I have experience in data analysis, decision-making support, and leveraging technology to improve operational efficiency. During my internship at Diskover Srl, I designed and developed SYRIAS — a web application for time series forecasting based on ARIMA models.
about.p3: I'm driven by digital transformation and the ability to extract value from data to support strategic decisions.

items.description: Study and presentation of the Flask framework. Design and development of SYRIAS: a web application for time series forecasting based on ARIMA models.
